display.purpose: Game names on detail hero only. Bebas Neue condensed authority.

stats.purpose: Rajdhani for rings, filter pills, tier headers, counts.

body.purpose: Achievement lists, nav, descriptions. System UI stack.

shadows.name: tier-icon-ring
shadows.purpose: Earned achievement icon wrap — tier-colored ring, not drop shadow.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state transitions, progress bar fill, ring stroke.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, chip, and row hover backgrounds.

motion.name: progress-reveal
motion.purpose: Hero progress bar width animation on game detail load.

components.name: App Button Default
components.description: Shell-level actions: nav links, Refresh on library. Not used on game detail hero.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: oklch(22% 0.016 275); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-default:hover { background: oklch(28% 0.018 275); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Hero Back Pill
components.description: Returns to library from game detail. Frosted pill over cover art; sentence case label.
components.css: .ds-chip-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); background: oklch(12% 0.014 275 / 0.72); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip-hero:hover { background: oklch(18% 0.014 275 / 0.85); border-color: oklch(40% 0.02 275 / 0.55); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-chip-hero:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-hero__icon { font-size: 1.05em; line-height: 1; opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Tier Filter Chip
components.description: Tier filter bar on game detail. Uppercase Rajdhani with count badge.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); background: oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.88); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip-filter:hover { background: oklch(20% 0.014 275 / 0.92); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-chip-filter:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-filter__count { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 1.25rem; padding: 0 5px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.08); color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); }

components.name: Tier Filter Chip Active (Gold)
components.description: Active tier filter — tier metal tint at 18% into dark base.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter--gold { color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 18%, oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.92)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 45%, transparent); } .ds-chip-filter--gold .ds-chip-filter__count { background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.14); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); }

components.name: Hidden Toggle Chip
components.description: Toggles hidden achievement descriptions. Neutral active state — never accent blue.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter--hidden[aria-pressed='true'] { color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: oklch(22% 0.014 275 / 0.92); border-color: oklch(45% 0.02 275 / 0.55); } .ds-chip-filter--hidden[aria-pressed='true'] .ds-chip-filter__count { background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.14); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); }

components.name: Achievement Row Earned
components.description: Earned achievement with gold tier tint, full border, tier pill.
components.html:
Master of the Universe
Complete all story missions.
gold
components.css: .ds-achievement-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-achievement-row--earned.ds-achievement-row--gold { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 12%, oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.92)); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 32%, oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.5)); } .ds-achievement-row__icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(28% 0.018 275); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-achievement-row__body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-achievement-row__name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-achievement-row__desc { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); margin-top: 2px; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-achievement-row__aside { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tier-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: capitalize; border: 1px solid; } .ds-tier-pill--gold { color: oklch(78% 0.15 88); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 16%, oklch(22% 0.016 275)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 45%, oklch(34% 0.02 275)); }

components.name: Tier Section Header
components.description: Divider between trophy tier groups in the achievement list.
components.css: .ds-tier-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 2px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.35); } .ds-tier-header__label { font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-tier-header--gold .ds-tier-header__label { color: oklch(78% 0.15 88); } .ds-tier-header__meta { font-size: 0.6875rem; color: oklch(58% 0.012 275); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

narrative.overview: AchieveMe is a late-night desktop companion: the Steam client is open, the room is dim, and the user is checking what they have left to platinum. The interface should feel like familiar dark gaming chrome with a trophy shelf inside it — progress you earned, metals that mean something, completion rings that read at a glance. Celebration comes from tier color and earned-state tinting, not from neon flash or loot-box motion. The canonical visual system is fully implemented on Game Detail; Library, Dashboard, and Settings must migrate from legacy inline purple styles.
keyCharacteristics: Hue-275 tinted dark neutrals for the shell; trophy metals carry identity
Bebas Neue for game titles only; Rajdhani for stats, filters, and chips
Frosted pill chips on cover art and matte pill filters in the achievement toolbar
Tier-tinted earned rows with full borders — never side-stripe accents
Restrained progress blue for rings and bars; accent blue for focus only

rules.name: The Metals Mean Earned Rule
rules.body: Trophy metal colors appear on earned achievements, tier filter active states, and completion celebration — never as generic decoration on inactive chrome.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Progress blue carries functional progress UI. Action blue is focus-only. Do not reintroduce Discord-purple (#5865f2) or blue-outlined ghost buttons on product surfaces.

rules.name: The Display Boundary Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue is reserved for game titles on the detail hero. Everything interactive uses Rajdhani or system UI.

rules.name: The Cover Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is allowed on hero pills over game art. Nowhere else unless the surface is literally over a photograph.

rules.name: The Flat Row Rule
rules.body: Achievement rows do not use box-shadow at rest. Icon wraps on earned rows may use a 1px tier-colored ring.

dos: Do use CSS custom properties from :root for all new surfaces — never hardcode #1a1a22 or #5865f2 on migrated pages.
Do use Rajdhani uppercase pills for filters, sort controls, and hero actions on game surfaces.
Do tint earned achievement rows with color-mix(in oklch, var(--tier-*) …) and full borders.
Do keep body text and placeholders at --ink-muted or darker on tinted near-dark backgrounds.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for bar fills, ring transitions, and skeleton pulse.
Do cap hero display type at clamp(…, 4rem) and use text-wrap: balance on game titles.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: cream backgrounds, identical card grids, eyebrow kickers, hero-metric templates.
Don't use gambling or RGB-neon aesthetics: flashy gradients, loot-box energy, overstimulating motion.
Don't ship bare spreadsheet utility: raw tables with zero personality and no earned celebration.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on rows or cards.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for emphasis.
Don't use blue accent outlines on resting buttons.
Don't apply Bebas Neue to buttons, nav labels, or achievement list items.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism on list rows or library cards.
